src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/C.general_idea: Replace the colon-space separator with a semicolon in the counter output format.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.general_idea: Refactor the appending of newlines around split markers to respect 'newlines' and 'minify' configuration flags.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.human_impl:
header.append("
<!-- start split -->"); if (newlines) header.append("

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.general_idea: Introduce a dedicated field to store the output directory path separately from the filename.
Replace dynamic extraction of the directory from the filename with the explicit outputDir field to allow independent configuration of output location.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.general_idea: Introduce support for specifying an output directory via command line argument with validation.
Wrap ZipFile usage in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure and prevent resource leaks.
Wrap InputStreams from ZipFile in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure.
Wrap FileInputStream usage in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure and prevent resource leaks.
Explicitly specify UTF-8 charset when parsing XML to fix encoding issues.
Update SAXParser.parse call to accept InputSource with Reader instead of raw InputStream for correct character encoding handling.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/W.general_idea: Explicitly specify UTF-8 charset for OutputStreamWriter to ensure consistent encoding across platforms.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.general_idea: Remove hardcoded license expiration logic and associated date parsing imports to clean up the main method.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.human_impl: Removed SimpleDateFormat/Date imports and the block checking if '2025-12-31' is before current date.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.general_idea: Add a new command-line option to specify the output directory for split files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Move distribution creation logic (Launch4j, Zip) into a dedicated Maven profile to separate concerns.
Remove the Launch4j executable generation step from the build process.
Add explicit resource copying steps for scripts and the fat JAR into the distribution directory.
Add a step to rename the generated fat JAR to a simpler name in the distribution folder.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exec-maven-plugin execution 'rename-jar' using PowerShell Move-Item

pom.xml.general_idea: Update PowerShell commands for archiving to use modern parameter syntax.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed Compress-Archive arguments to use named parameters like -CompressionLevel Optimal

pom.xml.general_idea: Add project name, description, and packaging type to POM metadata.
Explicitly configure UTF-8 encoding for source and reporting to prevent platform-dependent defaults.

.vscode/launch.json.general_idea: Update the default command-line arguments in the VS Code launch configuration to include output path and formatting options.
